extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won stage 3 sprint after peloton caught breakaway at 39km to go, holding off EWAN Caleb in headwind finish.
tactical_patterns: Team Sky harvested intermediate sprint bonuses with ROWE Luke piloting KWIATKOWSKI and BERNAL through, revealing GC control tactics.
BENNETT Sam specifically peaks for stage 3 opportunities at stage races, having won Paris-Nice stage 3 two years prior.
Headwind neutralized early breakaway by 39km mark, suggesting crosswind stages 1-2 were only realistic break windows this race.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: claimed third win of season, executed perfectly on self-identified last sprint opportunity, showing deliberate stage targeting
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: abandoned stage 3 with nausea after losing 17+ minutes, showing catastrophic form collapse at UAE
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: dropped to 9th after winning stages 1-2, tank empty after 51kph average yesterday proved unsustainable
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: second place finish shows recovery ability after two frantic opening stages, remains competitive depth option
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: caught in bridge crash bottleneck, race effectively over before GC shakeup stage 4
